subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali-Qabli-Akbar! Thy letter hath attained unto the Most Luminous Presence, and upon it have been directed the glances of thy Lord's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قبل اکبر قد فاز کتابک بالمنظر الانور و توجه الیه لحاظ عنایه ربک
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
